title: Vaanga Makka Vaanga Lyrics Kaaviya Thalaivan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Vaanga Makka Vaanga
Singer: Haricharan
Music : AR Rahman
Movie: Kaaviya Thalaivan

Senthamizhaala
isayakkootti Palapalavena kadha solluvom
Chandhirna saatchi vachi
Jagadhalapradhaava kadha solluvom.

Vaanga Makka Vaanga
enga nadagam pakka vaanga.
Vaanga Makka Vaanga
enga nadagam pakka vaanga.

Unga kannukkula
Vanna vanna maayam kaattuvom
Naanga vaanavilla
Unga nenjukulla kaattuvom.

Vaanga Makka Vaanga
enga nadagam pakka vaanga.
Vaanga Makka Vaanga
enga aattam paakka vaanga.
Vaanga Makka Vaanga
enga paatta kettka vaanga.

Thingal sevvaai
Budhan viyaalan belli
Thaangunaththom thagidaththom solli.

Neenga
Paakkaadha ulagaththa kaattuvom
Unga pagal kanava
Nenavaaga maaththuvom.

Vaanga Makka Vaanga
enga nadagam pakka vaanga.
Vaanga Makka Vaanga
enga aattam paakka vaanga.
Vaanga Makka Vaanga
enga paatta kettka vaanga.

Vaanga Makka Vaanga
Neenga vandi katti vaanga
Vaanga Makka Vaanga

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Vaanga Makka Vaanga conveys a message of unity and celebration, inviting everyone to come together and enjoy the festivities.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Kaaviya Thalaivan, this song is performed during a lively scene that showcases the characters' joy and camaraderie.

Who is the singer of the song?

The song is sung by the talented Haricharan, known for his powerful and energetic vocal style.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Vaanga Makka Vaanga is composed by the legendary AR Rahman, adding a unique flair to the track.

When was the song released?

The song was released on August 19, 2014, as part of the movie's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vaanga Makka Vaanga, the vibrant energy of the song encapsulates the essence of celebration and togetherness. Set against the backdrop of Kaaviya Thalaivan, it showcases the characters reveling in joy and camaraderie. The upbeat tempo and lively lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and excitement, making it a perfect anthem for festive occasions. Haricharan's powerful vocals further enhance the song's infectious spirit, inviting listeners to join in the celebration.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vaanga Makka Vaanga is an electrifying anthem that captures the spirit of celebration and joy in Kaaviya Thalaivan. With Haricharan's dynamic vocals and a vibrant musical arrangement, this song invites everyone to join in the fun. Experience the infectious energy that makes this track a must-listen for any festive occasion!
stanzaMeanings: In the sweet Tamil language, we will tell stories that flow like music. With the witness of the moon, we will narrate the stories of the world.
Sweet and beautiful, the stage of Shanmuganandha.
Come, people, come. Come and watch our play.
Green, yellow, red, and white, with Lord Krishna's grace.
We will show the colorful magic in your eyes. We are not from the sky; we will show it in your heart.
Come, people, come. Come and watch our play. Come, people, come. Come and see our dance. Come, people, come. Come and listen to our song.
The moon, the sun, and the planet Mercury are all here. We have come together and will tell you.
We will show you the world that you cannot see. Your daytime dreams will become reality.
Come, people, come. Come and watch our play. Come, people, come. Come and see our dance. Come, people, come. Come and listen to our song.
Come, people, come. You bring the vehicle and come. Come, people, come. You come and gather together.
